description: DOM vitest test files referenced by CRIT-709, CRIT-710, CRIT-711, CRIT-712 use the wrong path. The contract addresses them at `promptnotes/src/lib/editor/__tests__/<name>.dom.vitest.ts` (e.g., `block-element.dom.vitest.ts`, `slash-menu.dom.vitest.ts`, `editor-panel.dom.vitest.ts`). The actual files live under `promptnotes/src/lib/editor/__tests__/dom/<name>.dom.vitest.ts`. The `vitest.config.ts` include pattern is `src/lib/**/__tests__/dom/**/*.vitest.ts`, which matches the actual `dom/` subdirectory location. Reviewers running grep against the contract-cited paths will find no matches and incorrectly conclude the criteria fail; or worse, conclude they pass if grep is recursive but the assertion-name claims still cannot be verified.
